understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level (BP35 and onward) without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only); after the horizontal step, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (`o`/`m`/`w`), hit a hazard (spikes end the attempt), or reach the goal (`+` wins). CLICK targets a specific grid coordinate to interact with clickable/breakable tiles (e.g., removing `x` blocks) to open or change fall paths; clicks do not move you unless the removal causes you to fall. UNDO reverts the previous action. Planning uses the provided landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to choose safe moves and prioritize columns that create a passage to a different y-level.
